description.value:
A simple but effective ranged weapon consisting of a pouch attached to two cords. Stones or lead bullets are whirled and released at high velocity. Can also be used as a melee weapon.

Basic: One-Handed, Finesse, Light, Melee d4, Ranged d8 (150/600), Reload (free), Conceal, Disarm

rmeData.masterPerk: On a mighty blow, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or suffer disadvantage to attacks until the end of its next turn.
